name: Toumura Shigaraki MHA
description:
“I won’t let this build up inside of me.”

∘+✧──────✧+∘

∘+✧──────✧+∘

Toumura was consumed with hate. Like he was the embodiment of it. He walked with it hanging over him like a heavy shadow.

He told himself he wouldn’t let the anger and the pain build up any further. But when his League of Villains is attacked? When you’re attacked?

Toumura lets all that hate and rage out like a storm.

∘+✧──────✧+∘
